description_long: This object is a classic record player with a rectangular base, featuring a transparent dust cover that shields the main components. The base is a dark brown color, likely made of plastic or wood, and houses a circular, reddish platter at its center for holding vinyl records. A straight, light-colored tonearm is visible, positioned to the right of the platter, and appears to rest in its cradle. There are a few control elements, such as buttons or switches, located on the right side of the base, which are used to operate the device. The dust cover is slightly tinted and fits snugly over the entire top, providing protection from dust and debris. The overall design is minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and rounded corners, typical of mid-20th-century audio equipment.
description: A vintage-style record player with a dark brown base, a transparent dust cover, a red platter, and a visible tonearm and control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dust cover, red platter, and the tonearm resting on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the dust cover, platter, and control buttons more visible on the right.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the tonearm's length and its position over the platter.
description_view_3: Back view with the dust cover and platter visible, and the tonearm cradle on the left.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and centrally located, the platter is circular, flat, and red in color, occupying about one-third of the device's width. It appears to be made of plastic or metal with a smooth finish and no visible grooves or patterns.
attribute_tonearm: Present, straight, and light gray, the tonearm is positioned to the right of the platter and rests in its cradle. It is of moderate length, likely made of metal or plastic, and has a smooth, sleek finish.
attribute_control_knobs: Present, with at least two rectangular or square buttons or switches located on the right side of the base. They are small, dark in color, and flush with the surface, with no visible labels or markings.
attribute_dust_cover: Present, made of transparent plastic or acrylic, slightly tinted, and covering the entire top of the record player. It is closed and appears to be hinged at the back, fitting snugly over the base.
